events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 70,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 1.0,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Temporary bracing was removed prematurely before decking or permanent lateral stability elements were fully installed.",
    "Structural stability is compromised, creating an immediate collapse hazard under wind or construction loads."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evacuate the immediate area under and around the unbraced structural steel.",
    "Re-install temporary bracing or guy lines immediately under controlled safety conditions.",
    "Verify plumb, elevation, and alignment before proceeding with permanent decking or bracing."
  ],
  "rationale": "Removing temporary bracing before permanent stability elements (such as decking, diaphragms, or permanent bracing) are fully secured violates basic structural erection safety. This creates an immediate collapse risk, requiring a 'fail' decision and 'critical' risk rating.",
  "references": [
    "AISC 303 Section 7.10",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart R (1926.754)"
  ]
}
